gigapan.description:
Sunday Sunday, Sept 2nd, 2012, in the morning. We will be preparing it to burn, and then carrying it to the Man ashes and burning it this evening. 

As I type this, at 12:50 pm on Temple Sunday, BMIR just said 'We are talking about death, because it is Temple Sunday.' It makes sense.
